body.title: agent_datacenter: Discord shim — token management, reconnect backoff, self-test
body.result: DiscordBotShim implemented in agent_datacenter/devices/discord_bot/shim.py — no-op Phase 4 proxy; self_test verifies DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN + discord.log recency. Commit 3850610.
body.proposal: Igor wants to edit wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py (HIGH inertia). Plan: . Reason: HIGH inertia write requires human approval: wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py
body.description:
Discord shim: lifecycle management for the Discord bot. Token from env; reconnect with backoff; self-test via test channel send.

Proposed shape:
- agent_datacenter/devices/discord_bot/shim.py:
  class DiscordShim(BaseShim):
    device_id = 'discord'
    start() → connect Discord bot via discord.py; authenticate with DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN; return bool
    stop() → bot.close(); return bool
    restart() → stop(); exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, max 5 attempts); start()
    self_test() → send message to DISCORD_TEST_CHANNEL_ID; confirm receipt via message_id returned
      returns {passed: bool, details: 'Sent to #{channel}: {message_id}'}
    rollback() → bot.close() if start() fails mid-auth
  Reconnect backoff: configurable via DeviceConfig (uses restart_backoff_seconds)
  Token management: reads DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN from env (never hardcoded)

Affected files:
- ~/dev/src/agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/devices/discord_bot/shim.py

Design rules:
- no credential hardcoding: DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN from env only
- docs-in-code: comment on test channel env var (DISCORD_TEST_CHANNEL_ID)

Scope boundary:
IN: start/stop/restart with backoff, self_test via test channel, token from env
OUT: message routing logic (that's in DiscordDevice.send())

Test plan:
- DiscordShim() without DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN: start() returns False (not an exception)
- self_test() with mock Discord API: returns {passed: True, details: '...'}
- Reconnect backoff: 5 failed attempts → auto-block (via restart-loop-protection)
body.approved_plan: Igor wants to edit wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py (HIGH inertia). Plan: . Reason: HIGH inertia write requires human approval: wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py
body.approval_notes: Phase 4 proxy shim pattern approved — no-op start/stop, self_test checks token + log recency. The core_patterns.py proposal was the P1 hallucination bug; actual shim doesn't touch HIGH-inertia files.
